Get WIMZI
[http://anon.doubleclick.edgesuite.net/anon.doubleclick/cms/AOL/353992_1/mainimg.gif]http://message.aim.com/cgi-bin25/DM/y/hxOa0BTnFv50MuC0NsS0Ej
WIMZI™ isn't just fun to say, it's a whole new way to communicate. Put a WIMZI
widget on your MySpace, Facebook or any personal Website so visitors can IM you
right from the page! You don't even have to make your AIM® screen name public to
use it. Phew! WIMZI, you set our hearts aflutter. Find out more about AIM WIMZI.
[http://message.aim.com/cgi-bin25/DM/y/hxOa0BTnFv50MuC0NsS0Ej]

body_html:
THE FUTURE OF IM REVEALED

WIMZI™ isn't just fun to say, it's a whole new way to communicate. Put a WIMZI widget on your MySpace, Facebook or any personal Website so visitors can IM you right from the page! You don't even have to make your AIM® screen name public to use it. Phew! WIMZI, you set our hearts aflutter. Find out more about AIM WIMZI.

Cartoonify Yourself

You don't have to be a total hottie for your WeeMee™ to be. Make a WeeMee now. It's our little secret.
Get Forward!
Forward IMs to your mobile phone as a text message when you're on the go. Click here to find out more.
Acronym Dictionary
OMG, IDK what that means! Check out the acronym dictionary for all about IM lingo.
Hey, Cupid!
Tell your crush your feelings. Let Cupid Bot help you be cool and win hearts.
Keep It Together
Knowing the weather won't always keep you cool. Just watch this weatherman!
AIM.com | Support | AIM Today | AIM Pages
